DECLARATION OF KAIPO K.B. YOUNG IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR AN ORDER (1) COMPELLING DISCOVERY RESPONSES, (2) COMPELLING PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, (3) DEEMING THE TRUTH OF MATTERS STATED IN THE REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS AS ADMITTED, AND (4) IMPOSING MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST HEIDI KEREN HOBBS-ALFARO (TRANSACTION ID # 60082829) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FIRE CREDIT UNION

DISCOVERY 302, THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FIRE CREDIT UNION'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER (1) COMPELLING DISCOVERY RESPONSES, (2) COMPELLING PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, (3) DEEMING THE TRUTH OF MATTERS STATED IN THE REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS AS ADMITTED, AND (4) IMPOSING MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST HEIDI KEREN HOBBS-ALFARO IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. WITHIN FOURTEEN DAYS OF ENTRY OF THE COURT'S ORDER, DEFENDANT HEIDI KEREN HOBBS-ALFARO SHALL SERVE VERIFIED AND COMPLETE DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND VERIFIED AND COMPLETE PRODUCTION OF ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1215. THE TRUTH OF EACH MATTER STATED IN THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION, SET ONE, SHALL BE DEEMED ADMITTED AND CONCLUSIVELY ESTABLISHED FOR ALL PURPOSES IN THIS ACTION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE VERBATIM ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: MELINDA DERISH; CLERK: JOHNNY SENGMANY; NOT REPORTED.=302/JPT.

MOTION / Notice Of Motion For An Order (1) Compelling Discovery Responses, (2) Compelling Production Of Documents, (3) Deeming The Truth Of Matters Stated In The Request For Admissions As Admitted, And (4) Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Heidi Keren Hobbs-Alfaro
Off Calendar Feb-16-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE: ATTY KAIPO K.B. YOUNG OF LEADER-PICONE & YOUNG, LLP TEL NO 510-444-2404 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCE.

RULING- THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FIRE CREDIT UNION's Motion For An Order (1) Compelling Discovery Responses, (2) Compelling Production Of Documents, (3) Deeming The Truth Of Matters Stated In The Request For Admissions As Admitted, And (4) Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Heidi Keren Hobbs-Alfaro is granted.
No opposition filed. Within fourteen days of entry of the Court's order, defendant Heidi Keren Hobbs-Alfaro shall serve verified and complete discovery responses and verified and complete production of all responsive documents. Sanctions are awarded against defendant in the amount of $1215. The truth of each matter stated in the Requests for Admission, Set One, shall be deemed admitted and conclusively established for all purposes in this action. Prevailing party to prepare Verbatim Order. Judge Pro tem: Melinda Derish; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany; Not Reported.=302/jpt.
